requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — Household Refrigerating Appliances (NM/IEC 60335-2-24 via INNOQ)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——家用制冷器具（经INNOQ采纳的NM/IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——家用製冷器具（經INNOQ採納的NM/IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Mozambique's national standards body, INNOQ (Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade), develops Mozambican Standards (Normas Mocambicanas, NM) and characteristically adopts international IEC standards. For household refrigerating appliances, the applicable safety basis is IEC 60335-2-24 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers) read with the general standard IEC 60335-1, adopted as the corresponding NM standard. Key requirements cover protection against electric shock, insulation resistance and dielectric strength, thermal cut-outs, creepage and clearance distances, mechanical strength of the housing, earthing continuity, and appliance markings. Mozambique operates on a 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase grid, so appliances built to the IEC 60335-2-24 220-240 V / 50 Hz envelope are electrically aligned. For regulated goods, conformity may be demonstrated to INNOQ via test reports against the adopted NM/IEC standard, and import consignments may be subject to INNOQ import inspection / conformity assessment before release.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克国家标准机构INNOQ（国家标准化与质量研究所）制定莫桑比克标准（Normas Mocambicanas，NM），并通常采纳国际IEC标准。家用制冷器具的适用安全基础为IEC 60335-2-24（家用和类似用途电器的安全——第2-24部分：制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），须与通用标准IEC 60335-1结合使用，以相应NM标准的形式采纳。核心要求涵盖防触电保护、绝缘电阻与介电强度、热断路器、爬电距离与电气间隙、外壳机械强度、接地连续性及器具标识。莫桑比克采用220 V、50 Hz单相电网，因此按IEC 60335-2-24的220-240 V / 50 Hz范围制造的器具在电气上是一致的。对于受监管货物，可通过依据所采纳NM/IEC标准的检测报告向INNOQ证明合格，进口货物在放行前可能须经INNOQ进口检验/合格评定。
summary.zht: 莫三比克國家標準機構INNOQ（國家標準化與品質研究所）制定莫三比克標準（Normas Mocambicanas，NM），並通常採納國際IEC標準。家用製冷器具的適用安全基礎為IEC 60335-2-24（家用和類似用途電器的安全——第2-24部分：製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），須與通用標準IEC 60335-1結合使用，以相應NM標準的形式採納。核心要求涵蓋防觸電保護、絕緣電阻與介電強度、熱斷路器、爬電距離與電氣間隙、外殼機械強度、接地連續性及器具標識。莫三比克採用220 V、50 Hz單相電網，因此按IEC 60335-2-24的220-240 V / 50 Hz範圍製造的器具在電氣上是一致的。對於受監管貨物，可透過依據所採納NM/IEC標準的檢測報告向INNOQ證明合格，進口貨物在放行前可能須經INNOQ進口檢驗/合格評定。

standards_or_laws: IEC 60335-2-24 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Part 2-24: Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (adopted as the corresponding NM standard via INNOQ)
IEC 60335-1 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — General requirements (read in conjunction with Part 2-24)
INNOQ (Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade) — national standards body developing NM standards and operating conformity assessment / import inspection for regulated products

summary.en: China's mandatory safety standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 4706.13-2014 (Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers), technically derived from IEC 60335-2-24 but incorporating Chinese national deviations, read with the general standard GB 4706.1. GB 4706.13-2014 is mandatory (GB) and enforced by SAMR under the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) regime; products must be CCC-certified by a CNCA-designated certification body before sale in China. Because Mozambique and China both build on the same IEC 60335-2-24 base document, the underlying technical content is closely related; however, a Chinese CCC certificate is not automatically recognised by INNOQ, and conformity to the adopted NM/IEC standard must be demonstrated separately.
summary.zh: 中国家用制冷器具的强制性安全标准为GB 4706.13-2014（家用和类似用途电器的安全——制冷器具、冰淇淋器具和制冰机的特殊要求），技术上源自IEC 60335-2-24，但包含中国国家偏差，须与通用标准GB 4706.1结合使用。GB 4706.13-2014为强制性国家标准（GB），由市场监管总局（SAMR）通过中国强制认证（CCC）制度监督执行；产品须经CNCA指定认证机构完成CCC认证方可在中国销售。由于莫桑比克和中国均以同一IEC 60335-2-24基础文件为依据，底层技术内容密切相关；但中国CCC证书不被INNOQ自动承认，须另行证明符合所采纳的NM/IEC标准。
summary.zht: 中國家用製冷器具的強制性安全標準為GB 4706.13-2014（家用和類似用途電器的安全——製冷器具、冰淇淋器具和製冰機的特殊要求），技術上源自IEC 60335-2-24，但包含中國國家偏差，須與通用標準GB 4706.1結合使用。GB 4706.13-2014為強制性國家標準（GB），由市場監管總局（SAMR）通過中國強制認證（CCC）制度監督執行；產品須經CNCA指定認證機構完成CCC認證方可在中國銷售。由於莫三比克和中國均以同一IEC 60335-2-24基礎文件為依據，底層技術內容密切相關；但中國CCC證書不被INNOQ自動承認，須另行證明符合所採納的NM/IEC標準。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Safety of household and similar electrical appliances — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers (mandatory; derived from IEC 60335-2-24 with national deviations; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB 4706.1-2005 — General requirements (read in conjunction with GB 4706.13)

gap.en: Both China and Mozambique build on IEC 60335-2-24, so the core technical safety content is closely related — an advantage versus markets using a different standard family. The gaps are procedural rather than fundamental: (1) Recognition — a Chinese CCC certificate / GB 4706.13 test report is not automatically accepted by INNOQ; conformity to the adopted NM/IEC 60335-2-24 standard must be demonstrated, typically via a test report from an IECEE CB Scheme / ILAC MRA-accepted laboratory that covers IEC 60335-2-24. An IECEE CB Scheme report (IEC 60335-2-24 basis) is the most efficient route because it is internationally recognised. (2) Import inspection — regulated consignments may be subject to INNOQ conformity assessment / import inspection before customs release; an in-country importer of record is required. (3) Documentation language — markings, instructions, and safety information must be available in Portuguese.
gap.zh: 中国和莫桑比克均以IEC 60335-2-24为基础，因此核心技术安全内容密切相关——相较于使用不同标准体系的市场具有优势。差距是程序性的而非根本性的：（1）承认——中国CCC证书/GB 4706.13检测报告不被INNOQ自动接受；须证明符合所采纳的NM/IEC 60335-2-24标准，通常通过涵盖IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB体系/ILAC MRA接受实验室出具的检测报告。IECEE CB体系报告（基于IEC 60335-2-24）因受国际承认而为最高效路径。（2）进口检验——受监管货物在海关放行前可能须经INNOQ合格评定/进口检验；须有在地进口记录方。（3）文件语言——标识、说明书及安全信息须提供葡萄牙语版本。
gap.zht: 中國和莫三比克均以IEC 60335-2-24為基礎，因此核心技術安全內容密切相關——相較於使用不同標準體系的市場具有優勢。差距是程序性的而非根本性的：（1）承認——中國CCC證書/GB 4706.13檢測報告不被INNOQ自動接受；須證明符合所採納的NM/IEC 60335-2-24標準，通常透過涵蓋IEC 60335-2-24的IECEE CB體系/ILAC MRA接受實驗室出具的檢測報告。IECEE CB體系報告（基於IEC 60335-2-24）因受國際承認而為最高效路徑。（2）進口檢驗——受監管貨物在海關放行前可能須經INNOQ合格評定/進口檢驗；須有在地進口記錄方。（3）文件語言——標識、說明書及安全資訊須提供葡萄牙語版本。

mandatory_status.target: Conformity to the adopted NM/IEC 60335-2-24 safety standard is the expected basis for regulated household refrigerating appliances; INNOQ conformity assessment / import inspection may apply to regulated consignments before customs release. Exact regulated-product scope and procedure should be confirmed with INNOQ.
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4706.13-2014 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; products must be CCC-certified before sale in China; administered by SAMR/CNCA

source.publisher: INNOQ — Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade (Mozambique)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Mozambique adopts IEC 60335-2-24 (via INNOQ NM standards) as the safety basis for household refrigerating appliances, the same base document underlying China's GB 4706.13, so the technical gap is small. The procedural gap is recognition: a Chinese CCC certificate is not automatically accepted; demonstrate conformity to the adopted NM/IEC standard, ideally via an IECEE CB Scheme report, appoint an in-country importer, and provide Portuguese-language documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莫桑比克（经INNOQ的NM标准）采纳IEC 60335-2-24作为家用制冷器具的安全基础，与中国GB 4706.13的基础文件相同，因此技术差距很小。程序差距在于承认：中国CCC证书不被自动接受；须证明符合所采纳的NM/IEC标准，最好通过IECEE CB体系报告，委任在地进口商，并提供葡萄牙语文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 莫三比克（經INNOQ的NM標準）採納IEC 60335-2-24作為家用製冷器具的安全基礎，與中國GB 4706.13的基礎文件相同，因此技術差距很小。程序差距在於承認：中國CCC證書不被自動接受；須證明符合所採納的NM/IEC標準，最好透過IECEE CB體系報告，委任在地進口商，並提供葡萄牙語文件。
